ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "height" REAL /* User's height in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* User's weight in kilograms */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity type */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the activity took place */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the activity took place */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Average heart rate of the user during the activity */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the activity took place */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in minutes */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance covered during the activity in meters */,
  "calories_burned" INTEGER /* Calories burned during the activity */,
  "pace" REAL /* Average pace during the activity (e.g., minutes per kilometer) */,
  "activity_status" TEXT /* Status of the activity (e.g., 'completed', 'in_progress') */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_activity_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_type_id") REFERENCES activity_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity type */,
  "calories_burned_per_minute" REAL /* Average calories burned per minute for the activity type */,
  "recommended_frequency" TEXT /* Recommended frequency of the activity type (e.g., 'daily', '3 times a week') */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the activity type (e.g., 'easy', 'medium', 'hard') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heart_rate_data" (
  "heart_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heart rate data point */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity associated with the heart rate data */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate value */,
  "heart_rate_zone" TEXT /* Heart rate zone during the activity (e.g., 'resting', 'fat_burn', 'cardio', 'peak') */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the heart rate data was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the heart rate data was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the heart rate data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("heart_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heart_rate_data_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the goal */,
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity type */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of goal (e.g., 'distance', 'calories_burned') */,
  "target_value" INTEGER /* Target value for the goal */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the goal */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the goal */,
  "progress" REAL /* Current progress towards the goal (e.g., percentage completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the goal was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the goal was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_goals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_goals_activity_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_type_id") REFERENCES activity_types ("type_id")
)
